response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-04:18: Detected vocal song 'チーム友達' (Team Tomodachi). Based on the on-screen text, performed by Inugami Korone and Sakura Miko. Identified original artist as Kohjiya via search. 2. 04:19-05:00: Detected vocal song 'PANTS'. Based on on-screen text 'Music: Takaya Mic Mitsunago', identified composer/artist. Performed by Inugami Korone. Searched lyrics to confirm. Both songs are highly repetitive and lyrics were transcribed from the audio/video content.
response.global_summary: The video is a performance featuring two musical segments. In the first segment, VTubers Inugami Korone and Sakura Miko perform the song 'Team Tomodachi'. In the second segment, Inugami Korone performs the song 'Pants' with a crowd of frog puppets.

scenes.description: VTubers Inugami Korone and Sakura Miko perform the song 'Team Tomodachi' on a brightly lit virtual stage. The title 'TEAM TOMODACHI' appears on screen.
